description.ko: 거시적 위성 렌즈를 통해 지질학적 침식의 가공되지 않은 아름다움과 행성 표면의 자연스러운 기하학적 구조를 강조하며 지구의 물리적 피부를 상세하게 탐구합니다.
description.en: A detailed exploration of the Earth's physical skin, highlighting the raw beauty of geological erosion and the natural geometry of the planet's surface through a macro-satellite lens.

prompt: Ultra-high-resolution satellite photography of diverse Earth textures, featuring cracked desert clay, swirling sedimentary rock formations, and the organic patterns of a dried-up delta, cinematic lighting, top-down perspective, 8k resolution, highly detailed geological structures.
